mission.title: fluent-bit: Unable to automatically create a Kafka topic longer than 64 characters
mission.description: Unable to automatically create a Kafka topic longer than 64 characters. This issue affects 8+ users.

steps.title: Identify fluent-bit troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your fluent-bit deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit -n fluent-bit --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review fluent-bit configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant fluent-bit configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
kubectl get configmap -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluent-bit
```
## Bug Report

An attempt to start writing to a topic with a name greater than 64 characters is impossible due to a direct limitation in the code.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Unable to automatically create a Kafka topic longer than 64…
steps.description:
This commit increases the max length of kafka dynamic topics.

As the limit previously set (64) seemed arbitrary, and kafka allows for a maximum of 249 characters per topic, I think fluentbit should reflect that limit.
----
Enter `[N/A]` in the box, if an item is not applicable to your
```yaml
[2021/11/17 15:37:06] [ warn]  dynamic kafka topic length > 64 not allowed
[2021/11/17 15:37:15] [ warn]  dynamic kafka topic length > 64 not allowed
[2021/11/17 15:37:21] [ warn]  dynamic kafka topic length > 64 not allowed
[2021/11/17 15:37:23] [ warn]  dynamic kafka topic length > 64 not allowed
```

steps.title: Confirm Unable to automatically create a Kafka topic… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit -n fluent-bit --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n fluent-bit --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
This commit increases the max length of kafka dynamic topics.

As the limit previously set (64) seemed arbitrary, and kafka allows for a maximum of 249 characters per topic, I think fluentbit should reflect that limit.
----
Enter `[N/A]` in the box, if an item is not applicable to your change.
codeSnippets:
[2021/11/17 15:37:06] [ warn]  dynamic kafka topic length > 64 not allowed
[2021/11/17 15:37:15] [ warn]  dynamic kafka topic length > 64 not allowed

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with fluent-bit installed or the issue environment reproducible.
